top_signals.title: i-80 Gold terminates Vox Royalty offtake with $4.8M payment
top_signals.summary: i-80 said it is expected to realize cash flow savings through 2028.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Tokenization firm Securitize eyes early July NYSE debut with $400 million SPAC deal
top_signals.summary: Seeking to debut next week, Securitize will receive roughly $400 million after retaining more than 70% of its SPAC trust.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trump administration issues emergency order to keep Colorado coal plant operating
top_signals.summary: Plant was originally scheduled to shut down at the end of 2025, but in December and again in March, Secretary Wright issued emergency orders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
